description: Compute a weighted aggregate ScholarEval score from per-dimension ratings (each 1-5), with quality level, ASCII bar chart, and prioritised recommendations, into a text report.
rules: read-only — reads SCORES_JSON (and optional WEIGHTS_JSON), writes report.txt only
each dimension score must be between 1 and 5; weights (if supplied) must sum to 1.0
stdlib-only (json/argparse) — no third-party packages, fully offline
usage: Set SCORES_JSON to a JSON file of dimension->score (1-5), e.g. {"methodology":4.0,"writing":4.5}. Optionally set WEIGHTS_JSON (dimension->weight, summing to 1.0). Output: report.txt.
limitation: Read-only: never grades the work itself — it only aggregates ratings you supply. Bad input (score out of 1-5, or weights not summing to 1.0) makes the core exit non-zero; the porter still emits report.txt.
